purpose: Explicit migration aliases from legacy canonical timetable source IDs to reviewed authority/source and Calendar Readiness source IDs.

aliases.reason: Legacy manual timetable seed predates the canonical Authority/Source registry.
Legacy NAR seed used a generic home-route identifier.
Legacy JRA seed used a generic identifier while the reviewed programme source governs timetable capability.
Legacy Banei seed predates the canonical source key.
The live date/program parser is governed by the reviewed JRA programme readiness record.
The canonical HKJC readiness record covers the reviewed fixture and programme route family.
